suggestions.topic: EIP-8061 SFI and EIP-8080 DFI decisions for Hegotá
suggestions.rationale: Both decisions were explicitly deferred to 'next ACDC (two weeks)' from ACDC #179 (May 28), making them due at ACDC #181. EIP-8061 has been tested since devnet-1; EIP-8080 needs community consensus on queue-sharing approach.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8282 (separate builder deposit contract) decision following ACDT review
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #180 to 'ACDT Monday' (June 15) with explicit requirement for attack severity quantification and Justin's presence. Teams need to report findings on DOS attack surface vs. implementation cost tradeoff for Glamsterdam.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-5 stability update and devnet-6 planning
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-5 was unstable as of ACDC #180 due to Grandine fork-choice bug (unfixed) and Prysm peering issues. Scope freeze for devnet-6 depends on two weeks of devnet-5 stability; need status check on Grandine fix and decision on whether to proceed to devnet-6.

suggestions.topic: PTC attestation fork-choice liveness concerns and cross-branch attestation strategy
suggestions.rationale: Potuz flagged serious liveness risk in ACDC #180: all clients use canonical head only for PTC duties, creating zero cross-branch attestations during multi-branch forks. Lazy fix (skip PTC if not in committee) deployed but doesn't address fundamental liveness issue. Needs architectural discussion before mainnet.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold) review and Hegotá inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Proposed for Hegotá at ACDC #179 with explicit request for client review and Lido validator impact data before 'next ACDC.' Not discussed at ACDC #180 despite being due; needs confirmation of review completion and formal inclusion decision.

suggestions.topic: Beacon API validator state renaming (beacon-APIs #618) and breaking change policy
suggestions.rationale: Breaking change flagged in ACDC #180: 'pending-queued' state names are outdated post-EIP-6110/7251. PR #618 open but requires ecosystem tooling input and potential API version bump. Action item assigned but no follow-up; needs coordination on breaking change timeline.

suggestions.topic: submitBeaconBlock builder API (builder-specs #162) stateful mapping concerns
suggestions.rationale: Deferred in ACDC #180 pending more client implementation experience. Concern raised about beacon node needing to track which builder URL supplied each bid. Not urgent but worth revisiting once devnet-6 builder integration is underway.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8243 (pre-aggregating attestations at source) feasibility and benefits vs. simpler alternatives
suggestions.rationale: Presented at ACDC #180 for Hegotá with claimed 2x wire reduction via batch-seal mechanism. Questions raised about whether benefit justifies complexity vs. just increasing aggregator count. New proposal needing initial feedback before moving forward.
